mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_overview_stats_flat ( warehouse_id, tenant, last_synced_at, active_warehouses, total_skus, low_stock_items, out_of_stock_items, pending_fulfillments, shipped_today, pending_pick_lists ) SELECT w.id, w.tenant, NOW(), 1, COALESCE(inv_stats.total_skus, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.low_stock_items, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.out_of_stock_items, 0), COALESCE(ful_stats.pending_fulfillments, 0), COALESCE(ful_stats.shipped_today, 0), COALESCE(pl_stats.pending_pick_lists, 0) FROM hm_warehouse.warehouses w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT primary_fc, COUNT(*) as total_skus, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold AND available_quantity > 0) as low_stock_items, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity = 0) as out_of_stock_items FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item WHERE state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') GROUP BY primary_fc ) inv_stats ON inv_stats.primary_fc = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id IN ('INITIATED', 'PICKING', 'PACKING')) as pending_fulfillments, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id = 'SHIPPED' AND CAST(shipped_at AS DATE) = CURRENT_DATE) as shipped_today FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders GROUP BY warehouse_id ) ful_stats ON ful_stats.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) as pending_pick_lists FROM hm_fulfillment.pick_lists WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') GROUP BY warehouse_id ) pl_stats ON pl_stats.warehouse_id = w.id WHERE w.is_active = true

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_overview_stats_flat ( warehouse_id, tenant, last_synced_at, active_warehouses, total_skus, low_stock_items, out_of_stock_items, pending_fulfillments, shipped_today, pending_pick_lists ) SELECT '__ALL__', 'homebase', NOW(), COUNT(DISTINCT w.id), COALESCE(SUM(inv_stats.total_skus), 0), COALESCE(SUM(inv_stats.low_stock_items), 0), COALESCE(SUM(inv_stats.out_of_stock_items), 0), COALESCE(SUM(ful_stats.pending_fulfillments), 0), COALESCE(SUM(ful_stats.shipped_today), 0), COALESCE(SUM(pl_stats.pending_pick_lists), 0) FROM hm_warehouse.warehouses w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT primary_fc, COUNT(*) as total_skus, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold AND available_quantity > 0) as low_stock_items, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity = 0) as out_of_stock_items FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item WHERE state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') GROUP BY primary_fc ) inv_stats ON inv_stats.primary_fc = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id IN ('INITIATED', 'PICKING', 'PACKING')) as pending_fulfillments, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id = 'SHIPPED' AND CAST(shipped_at AS DATE) = CURRENT_DATE) as shipped_today FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders GROUP BY warehouse_id ) ful_stats ON ful_stats.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) as pending_pick_lists FROM hm_fulfillment.pick_lists WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') GROUP BY warehouse_id ) pl_stats ON pl_stats.warehouse_id = w.id WHERE w.is_active = true

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_inventory_with_product_flat ( inventory_id, tenant, last_synced_at, sku, product_id, variant_id, total_quantity, available_quantity, reserved_quantity, damaged_quantity, inbound_quantity, low_stock_threshold, inventory_status, stm_state, warehouse_id, product_name, brand, product_state, category_name, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, warehouse_city, is_low_stock, is_out_of_stock ) SELECT ii.id, ii.tenant, NOW(), ii.sku, ii.product_id, ii.variant_id, COALESCE(ii.total_quantity, 0), COALESCE(ii.available_quantity, 0), COALESCE(ii.reserved_quantity, 0), COALESCE(ii.damaged_quantity, 0), COALESCE(ii.inbound_quantity, 0), COALESCE(ii.low_stock_threshold, 0), ii.inventory_status, ii.state_id, ii.primary_fc, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(p.state_id, ''), COALESCE(p.category_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), COALESCE(w.city, ''), CASE WHEN ii.available_quantity <= ii.low_stock_threshold AND ii.available_quantity > 0 THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ii.available_quantity = 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item ii LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON ii.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON ii.primary_fc = w.id WHERE ii.state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE')

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_fulfillment_with_order_flat ( fulfillment_id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, fulfillment_state, priority, fulfillment_type, total_items, total_weight_grams, assigned_picker, assigned_packer, pick_started_at, pick_completed_at, pack_started_at, pack_completed_at, shipped_at, carrier, tracking_number, shipping_method, estimated_ship_date, estimated_delivery_date, notes, created_time, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, order_number, order_state, order_amount, order_currency, customer_id, customer_first_name, customer_last_name, shipping_status, current_location ) SELECT fo.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), fo.order_id, fo.state_id, fo.priority, fo.fulfillment_type, COALESCE(fo.total_items, 0), COALESCE(fo.total_weight_grams, 0), fo.assigned_picker_id, fo.assigned_packer_id, fo.pick_started_at, fo.pick_completed_at, fo.pack_started_at, fo.pack_completed_at, fo.shipped_at, fo.carrier, fo.tracking_number, fo.shipping_method, fo.estimated_ship_date, fo.estimated_delivery_date, fo.notes, fo.created_time, fo.warehouse_id, COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), COALESCE(o.state_id, ''), COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0), COALESCE(o.currency, 'INR'), o.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), COALESCE(sh.state_id, ''), COALESCE(sh.current_location, '') FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON fo.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON fo.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON o.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hm_shipping.shipments sh ON sh.order_id = fo.order_id

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_pick_list_flat ( pick_list_id, tenant, last_synced_at, fulfillment_order_id, warehouse_id, assigned_to, pick_status, item_count, picked_count, started_at, completed_at, notes, created_time, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, order_id, fulfillment_state, fulfillment_priority, fulfillment_total_items, order_number, customer_id ) SELECT pl.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), pl.fulfillment_order_id, pl.warehouse_id, pl.assigned_to, pl.status, COALESCE(pl.item_count, 0), COALESCE(pl.picked_count, 0), pl.started_at, pl.completed_at, pl.notes, pl.created_time, COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), fo.order_id, fo.state_id, fo.priority, COALESCE(fo.total_items, 0), COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), o.customer_id FROM hm_fulfillment.pick_lists pl JOIN hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo ON pl.fulfillment_order_id = fo.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON pl.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON fo.order_id = o.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_fulfillment_line_items_flat ( line_item_id, tenant, last_synced_at, fulfillment_order_id, order_item_id, product_id, variant_id, sku, quantity_ordered, quantity_allocated, quantity_picked, quantity_packed, quantity_shipped, quantity_short, bin_location, item_status, product_name, brand, weight_grams, unit_price, total_price ) SELECT fli.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), fli.fulfillment_order_id, fli.order_item_id, fli.product_id, fli.variant_id, fli.sku, COALESCE(fli.quantity_ordered, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_allocated, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_picked, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_packed, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_shipped, 0), COALESCE(fli.quantity_short, 0), fli.bin_location, fli.status, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(p.weight_grams, 0), COALESCE(oi.unit_price, 0), COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0) FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_line_items fli JOIN hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo ON fli.fulfillment_order_id = fo.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON fli.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_items oi ON fli.order_item_id = oi.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_inventory_by_location_flat ( warehouse_inventory_id, tenant, last_synced_at, warehouse_id, location_id, product_id, variant_id, sku, quantity_on_hand, quantity_reserved, quantity_available, quantity_damaged, quantity_in_transit, last_counted_at, location_code, zone, aisle, shelf, bin, location_type, location_capacity, location_current_units, product_name, brand, warehouse_name, warehouse_code ) SELECT wi.id, w.tenant, NOW(), wl.warehouse_id, wi.location_id, wi.product_id, wi.variant_id, wi.sku, COALESCE(wi.quantity_on_hand, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_reserved, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_available, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_damaged, 0), COALESCE(wi.quantity_in_transit, 0), wi.last_counted_at, wl.location_code, wl.zone, wl.aisle, wl.shelf, wl.bin, wl.location_type, COALESCE(wl.capacity_units, 0), COALESCE(wl.current_units, 0), COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, '') FROM hm_warehouse.warehouse_inventory wi JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouse_locations wl ON wi.location_id = wl.id JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON wl.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON wi.product_id = p.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.wms_inbound_shipments_flat ( inventory_item_id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, variant_id, sku, quantity, movement_type, reference_id, fulfillment_center_id, movement_time, reason, supplier_id, product_name, brand, fulfillment_center_name, fulfillment_center_code, supplier_name, supplier_state ) SELECT im.inventory_item_id, im.tenant, NOW(), ii.product_id, ii.variant_id, ii.sku, im.quantity, im.movement_type, im.reference_id, ii.primary_fc, im.movement_time, im.reason, ii.supplier_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), COALESCE(s.state_id, '') FROM hm_inventory.inventory_movements im JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item ii ON im.inventory_item_id = ii.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON ii.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON ii.primary_fc = w.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON ii.supplier_id = s.id WHERE im.movement_type IN ('INBOUND', 'SUPPLIER_SHIPMENT', 'PURCHASE_ORDER')
mapper.update: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_warehouse ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, pincode, country, latitude, longitude, timezone, contact_phone, contact_email, manager_id, max_capacity_units, current_utilization_pct, is_active, is_returns_center, operating_hours_json, supported_carriers_json, total_skus, total_units, low_stock_count, pending_fulfillments, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT w.id, w.tenant, NOW(), w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_type, w.address_line1, w.address_line2, w.city, w.state, w.pincode, w.country, w.latitude, w.longitude, w.timezone, w.contact_phone, w.contact_email, w.manager_id, w.max_capacity_units, w.current_utilization_pct, w.is_active, w.is_returns_center, w.operating_hours_json, w.supported_carriers_json, COALESCE(inv_stats.total_skus, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.total_units, 0), COALESCE(inv_stats.low_stock_count, 0), COALESCE(ful_stats.pending_fulfillments, 0), w.created_time, w.last_modified_time FROM hm_warehouse.warehouses w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT primary_fc, COUNT(*) as total_skus, SUM(available_quantity) as total_units, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE available_quantity <= low_stock_threshold) as low_stock_count FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item WHERE state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE') GROUP BY primary_fc ) inv_stats ON inv_stats.primary_fc = w.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warehouse_id, COUNT(*) as pending_fulfillments FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders WHERE state_id IN ('INITIATED', 'PICKING', 'PACKING') GROUP BY warehouse_id ) ful_stats ON ful_stats.warehouse_id = w.id ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET warehouse_name = EXCLUDED.warehouse_name, warehouse_type = EXCLUDED.warehouse_type, city = EXCLUDED.city, state = EXCLUDED.state, max_capacity_units = EXCLUDED.max_capacity_units, current_utilization_pct = EXCLUDED.current_utilization_pct, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, total_skus = EXCLUDED.total_skus, total_units = EXCLUDED.total_units, low_stock_count = EXCLUDED.low_stock_count, pending_fulfillments = EXCLUDED.pending_fulfillments, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
